# Cybromines

> Cybromines is an AI-native software house. We design, build, and integrate the
> systems businesses run on — ERP, CRM, POS, inventory, production, property, and
> queue management — and put AI agents to work across all of them. Based in Dubai,
> serving enterprises across the GCC and internationally.

## Solutions
- [ERP System](https://cybromines.com/solutions/erp/): Trading, inventory, finance, HRM, and POS on one ledger, with GCC compliance.
- [CRM System](https://cybromines.com/solutions/crm/): Omnichannel pipeline with WhatsApp-native CRM and AI lead handling.
- [POS System](https://cybromines.com/solutions/pos/): Offline-capable, multi-branch point of sale.
- [Inventory System](https://cybromines.com/solutions/inventory/): Real-time multi-warehouse stock with AI reordering.
- [Production System](https://cybromines.com/solutions/production/): BOMs, work orders, and AI scheduling.
- [Property System](https://cybromines.com/solutions/property/): Units, leases, tenants, and maintenance.
- [Queue Management](https://cybromines.com/solutions/queue/): Token issuing, routing, displays, and AI wait-time prediction.

## AI
- [AI Agents](https://cybromines.com/ai-agents/): Autonomous agents that run operations across every system.
- [AI Consulting](https://cybromines.com/ai-consulting/): We help companies adopt AI by integrating the right tools around real use cases.

## Integrations
- [WhatsApp CRM](https://cybromines.com/integrations/whatsapp-crm/): WhatsApp Business Cloud API, shared inbox, broadcasts, chatbots.
- [Facebook Ads](https://cybromines.com/integrations/facebook-ads/): Lead-form sync, Conversions API, and CRM audience sync.

## Services
- [Custom software development](https://cybromines.com/services/custom-software/)
- [SEO services](https://cybromines.com/services/seo/)
- [Mobile apps](https://cybromines.com/services/mobile-apps/)
